title: The Best Service Station Coffee in Bavaria
blurb: An unreasonably detailed ranking of motorway coffee between Munich and the Austrian border, because someone had to do it.
imageAlt: A motorway service station coffee cup on a wooden table with mountains in the background

title: Why Every Berlin U-Bahn Platform Smells Different
blurb: A short, slightly unhinged investigation into the distinct smell of each U-Bahn line, and what it tells you about the station above it.
imageAlt: An empty Berlin U-Bahn platform lit by fluorescent lights
